title: Databricks Asset Bundles is now Declarative Automation Bundles
body: Databricks Asset Bundles has been renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles. See [Why was Databricks Asset Bundles renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles?](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/faqs#rename).

ref_links.text: Why was Databricks Asset Bundles renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles?
